description: The fourth volume of the Deadly Sins of Evil — the pride-aligned tale of intrigue around the criminal organization Père Noël in the wake of Lucifenia's collapse. A new chairman is installed, a search begins for the Seventh, Magician, and a duel on Merrigod Plateau brings demons of pride, wrath, and lust onto the same stage. Spans a Prologue, two parts (Fifth, Pierrot / The Duel of Merrigod Plateau), an Epilogue, and an Extra Chapter, Bonus Story, and Afterword tail.
